arboviral_diseases_chikungunya_virus_dis.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Chikungunya virus disease

arboviral_diseases_jamestown_canyon_viru.short_description: Weekly case count of Jamestown Canyon virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_jamestown_canyon_viru.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Jamestown Canyon virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_la_crosse_virus_disea.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of La Crosse virus disease, an arboviral encephalitis transmitted by the eastern treehole mosquito, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_powassan_virus_diseas.short_description: Weekly case count of Powassan virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_powassan_virus_diseas.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Powassan virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by ticks, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_st_louis_encephalitis.long_name: Weekly reported cases of St. Louis encephalitis virus disease
arboviral_diseases_st_louis_encephalitis.short_description: Weekly case count of St. Louis encephalitis virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_st_louis_encephalitis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of St. Louis encephalitis virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by Culex mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_west_nile_virus_disea.long_name: Weekly reported cases of West Nile virus disease
arboviral_diseases_west_nile_virus_disea.short_description: Weekly case count of West Nile virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_west_nile_virus_disea.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of West Nile virus disease, the most common arboviral disease in the US transmitted by Culex mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_western_equine_enceph.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Western equine encephalitis virus disease
arboviral_diseases_western_equine_enceph.short_description: Weekly case count of Western equine encephalitis virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_western_equine_enceph.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Western equine encephalitis (WEE) virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

babesiosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of babesiosis, a tick-borne parasitic disease caused by Babesia species, as reported through the NNDSS.

botulism_foodborne.long_name: Weekly reported cases of foodborne botulism
botulism_foodborne.short_description: Weekly case count of foodborne botulism.
botulism_foodborne.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of foodborne botulism, caused by ingestion of preformed Clostridium botulinum toxin in contaminated food, as reported through the NNDSS.

botulism_infant.long_name: Weekly reported cases of infant botulism
botulism_infant.short_description: Weekly case count of infant botulism.
botulism_infant.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of infant botulism, caused by ingestion of Clostridium botulinum spores that colonize the infant intestine and produce toxin, as reported through the NNDSS.

botulism_other_wound_unspecified.long_name: Weekly reported cases of botulism (other, wound, and unspecified)
botulism_other_wound_unspecified.short_description: Weekly case count of botulism (other, wound, and unspecified types).

brucellosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of brucellosis, a bacterial zoonotic disease caused by Brucella species, as reported through the NNDSS.

campylobacteriosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of campylobacteriosis, a bacterial gastrointestinal infection caused by Campylobacter species, as reported through the NNDSS.

candida_auris_clinical.long_name: Weekly reported clinical cases of Candida auris
candida_auris_clinical.short_description: Weekly case count of clinical Candida auris infections.
candida_auris_clinical.long_description: Weekly number of reported clinical cases of Candida auris, an emerging multidrug-resistant fungal pathogen, as reported through the NNDSS. Clinical cases involve C. auris isolated from a clinical specimen.

candida_auris_screening.long_name: Weekly reported screening cases of Candida auris
candida_auris_screening.short_description: Weekly count of Candida auris detections from screening.
candida_auris_screening.long_description: Weekly number of Candida auris detections from colonization screening (non-clinical specimens), as reported through the NNDSS. Screening cases identify asymptomatic colonization.

carbapenemase_producing_carbapenem_resis.long_name: Weekly reported cases of carbapenemase-producing carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae
carbapenemase_producing_carbapenem_resis.short_description: Weekly case count of CP-CRE infections.
carbapenemase_producing_carbapenem_resis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of carbapenemase-producing carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae (CP-CRE), multidrug-resistant bacterial infections of significant public health concern, as reported through the NNDSS.

carbapenemase_producing_organisms_cpo_to.long_name: Weekly reported total cases of carbapenemase-producing organisms
carbapenemase_producing_organisms_cpo_to.short_description: Weekly total case count of carbapenemase-producing organisms.
carbapenemase_producing_organisms_cpo_to.long_description: Weekly total number of reported cases of carbapenemase-producing organisms (CPO), including all species, as reported through the NNDSS.

chancroid.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of chancroid, a sexually transmitted infection caused by Haemophilus ducreyi, as reported through the NNDSS.

chlamydia_trachomatis_infection.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Chlamydia trachomatis infection
chlamydia_trachomatis_infection.short_description: Weekly case count of Chlamydia trachomatis infection.
chlamydia_trachomatis_infection.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Chlamydia trachomatis infection, the most common nationally notifiable sexually transmitted infection in the US, as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis.short_description: Weekly case count of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever).
coccidioidomycosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever), a fungal infection caused by Coccidioides species endemic to the southwestern US, as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis_confirmed.long_name: Weekly reported confirmed cases of Coccidioidomycosis
coccidioidomycosis_confirmed.short_description: Weekly count of confirmed coccidioidomycosis cases.

coccidioidomycosis_probable.long_name: Weekly reported probable cases of Coccidioidomycosis
coccidioidomycosis_probable.short_description: Weekly count of probable coccidioidomycosis cases.

coccidioidomycosis_total.long_name: Weekly reported total cases of Coccidioidomycosis

coccidioidomycosis_total.long_description: Weekly total number of reported cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever), including confirmed and probable, as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis_total_2.long_name: Weekly reported total cases of Coccidioidomycosis (alternate reporting)

coccidioidomycosis_total_2.long_description: Weekly total number of reported cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever) from an alternate reporting period or classification, as reported through the NNDSS.

cryptosporidiosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of cryptosporidiosis, a parasitic gastrointestinal disease caused by Cryptosporidium, as reported through the NNDSS.

cyclosporiasis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of cyclosporiasis, an intestinal infection caused by the parasite Cyclospora cayetanensis, as reported through the NNDSS.

dengue_virus_infections_dengue.short_description: Weekly case count of dengue virus infection.
dengue_virus_infections_dengue.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of dengue, a mosquito-borne viral disease caused by dengue virus, as reported through the NNDSS.

dengue_virus_infections_dengue_like_illn.long_name: Weekly reported cases of dengue-like illness

dengue_virus_infections_severe_dengue.long_name: Weekly reported cases of severe dengue

novel_influenza_a_virus_infections.long_name: Weekly reported cases of novel influenza A virus infections
novel_influenza_a_virus_infections.short_description: Weekly case count of novel influenza A virus infections.
novel_influenza_a_virus_infections.long_description: Weekly number of reported human infections with novel influenza A viruses (non-seasonal subtypes such as H5, H7, or variant viruses), as reported through the NNDSS.

pertussis.short_description: Weekly case count of pertussis (whooping cough).
pertussis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of pertussis (whooping cough), a highly contagious respiratory disease caused by Bordetella pertussis, as reported through the NNDSS.

psittacosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of psittacosis, a bacterial respiratory infection caused by Chlamydophila psittaci typically acquired from birds, as reported through the NNDSS.

q_fever_acute.long_name: Weekly reported cases of acute Q fever
q_fever_acute.short_description: Weekly case count of acute Q fever.
q_fever_acute.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of acute Q fever, caused by Coxiella burnetii typically acquired from livestock, as reported through the NNDSS.

q_fever_chronic.long_name: Weekly reported cases of chronic Q fever
q_fever_chronic.short_description: Weekly case count of chronic Q fever.
q_fever_chronic.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of chronic Q fever, a serious long-term infection with Coxiella burnetii, as reported through the NNDSS.

q_fever_total.long_name: Weekly reported total cases of Q fever
q_fever_total.short_description: Weekly total case count of Q fever (acute and chronic).
q_fever_total.long_description: Weekly total number of reported cases of Q fever, combining acute and chronic cases, as reported through the NNDSS.

rabies_animal.long_name: Weekly reported cases of animal Rabies
rabies_animal.short_description: Weekly count of confirmed animal rabies cases.
rabies_animal.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of rabies in animals, as reported through the NNDSS.

rubella.short_description: Weekly case count of rubella (German measles).
rubella.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of rubella (German measles), a viral disease prevented by MMR vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonella_typhi_infection.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Salmonella Typhi infection
salmonella_typhi_infection.short_description: Weekly case count of Salmonella Typhi infection (typhoid fever).
salmonella_typhi_infection.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Salmonella Typhi infection (typhoid fever), as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonella_paratyphi_infection.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection
salmonella_paratyphi_infection.short_description: Weekly case count of Salmonella Paratyphi infection.
salmonella_paratyphi_infection.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection (paratyphoid fever), as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonella_paratyphi_infection_2.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection (alternate reporting)
salmonella_paratyphi_infection_2.short_description: Weekly case count of Salmonella Paratyphi infection (alternate column).
salmonella_paratyphi_infection_2.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection from an alternate reporting period or classification, as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonellosis_excluding_salmonella_typhi.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Salmonellosis (excluding Typhi and Paratyphi)
salmonellosis_excluding_salmonella_typhi.short_description: Weekly case count of non-typhoidal salmonellosis.
salmonellosis_excluding_salmonella_typhi.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of salmonellosis excluding Salmonella Typhi and Salmonella Paratyphi infections, as reported through the NNDSS.

shiga_toxin_producing_escherichia_coli_s.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Shiga toxin-producing E. coli (STEC)
shiga_toxin_producing_escherichia_coli_s.short_description: Weekly case count of STEC infection.
shiga_toxin_producing_escherichia_coli_s.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of Shiga toxin-producing Escherichia coli (STEC) infection, a cause of bloody diarrhea and hemolytic uremic syndrome, as reported through the NNDSS.

shigellosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of shigellosis, a bacterial dysentery caused by Shigella species, as reported through the NNDSS.

streptococcal_toxic_shock_syndrome.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Streptococcal toxic shock syndrome
streptococcal_toxic_shock_syndrome.short_description: Weekly case count of streptococcal toxic shock syndrome.
streptococcal_toxic_shock_syndrome.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of streptococcal toxic shock syndrome (STSS), a life-threatening condition caused by group A Streptococcus, as reported through the NNDSS.

syphilis_congenital.long_name: Weekly reported cases of congenital Syphilis
syphilis_congenital.short_description: Weekly case count of congenital syphilis.
syphilis_congenital.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of congenital syphilis (mother-to-child transmission), as reported through the NNDSS.

syphilis_primary_and_secondary.long_name: Weekly reported cases of primary and secondary Syphilis
syphilis_primary_and_secondary.short_description: Weekly case count of primary and secondary syphilis.
syphilis_primary_and_secondary.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of primary and secondary syphilis, the most infectious stages, as reported through the NNDSS.

tetanus.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of tetanus, a serious bacterial infection caused by Clostridium tetani, preventable by vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

toxic_shock_syndrome_other_than_streptoc.long_name: Weekly reported cases of toxic shock syndrome (non-streptococcal)
toxic_shock_syndrome_other_than_streptoc.short_description: Weekly case count of non-streptococcal toxic shock syndrome.
toxic_shock_syndrome_other_than_streptoc.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of toxic shock syndrome caused by agents other than group A Streptococcus (typically staphylococcal), as reported through the NNDSS.

trichinellosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of trichinellosis (trichinosis), a parasitic disease caused by Trichinella roundworms from undercooked meat, as reported through the NNDSS.

tuberculosis.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of tuberculosis (TB), a bacterial infection caused by Mycobacterium tuberculosis, as reported through the NNDSS.

tularemia.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of tularemia, a bacterial disease caused by Francisella tularensis transmitted by ticks or contact with infected animals, as reported through the NNDSS.

vancomycin_intermediate_staphylococcus_a.long_name: Weekly reported cases of vancomycin-intermediate Staphylococcus aureus
vancomycin_intermediate_staphylococcus_a.short_description: Weekly case count of VISA infections.
vancomycin_intermediate_staphylococcus_a.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of vancomycin-intermediate Staphylococcus aureus (VISA), an antimicrobial-resistant infection of public health concern, as reported through the NNDSS.

vancomycin_resistant_staphylococcus_aure.long_name: Weekly reported cases of vancomycin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus
vancomycin_resistant_staphylococcus_aure.short_description: Weekly case count of VRSA infections.
vancomycin_resistant_staphylococcus_aure.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of vancomycin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (VRSA), a rare but serious antimicrobial-resistant infection, as reported through the NNDSS.

varicella_morbidity.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Varicella morbidity
varicella_morbidity.short_description: Weekly case count of varicella (chickenpox) morbidity.
varicella_morbidity.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of varicella (chickenpox) morbidity, caused by varicella-zoster virus and preventable by vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

varicella_disease.long_name: Weekly reported cases of Varicella disease
varicella_disease.short_description: Weekly case count of varicella (chickenpox) disease.
varicella_disease.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of varicella (chickenpox) disease, as reported through the NNDSS.

vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_name: Weekly reported confirmed cases of Vibriosis
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.short_description: Weekly count of confirmed vibriosis cases (non-cholera Vibrio species).
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_description: Weekly number of confirmed cases of vibriosis caused by any species of the family Vibrionaceae other than toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O1 or O139, as reported through the NNDSS.

vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_name: Weekly reported probable cases of Vibriosis
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.short_description: Weekly count of probable vibriosis cases (non-cholera Vibrio species).
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_description: Weekly number of probable cases of vibriosis caused by any species of the family Vibrionaceae other than toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O1 or O139, as reported through the NNDSS.

zika_virus_disease_non_congenital.long_name: Weekly reported cases of non-congenital Zika virus disease
zika_virus_disease_non_congenital.short_description: Weekly case count of non-congenital Zika virus disease.
zika_virus_disease_non_congenital.long_description: Weekly number of reported cases of non-congenital Zika virus disease, a mosquito-borne flavivirus infection, as reported through the NNDSS.

nnds.name: National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS)
nnds.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nnds.description: The National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS) is a nationwide collaboration that enables all levels of public health to share notifiable disease related health information. Public health uses this information to monitor, control, and prevent the occurrence and spread of state-reportable and nationally notifiable infectious and some non-infectious diseases and conditions.
nnds.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
